'''Grub-tea''' was a bitter-tasting [[Tea/Legends|tea]] drink. The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] brewed and drank some grub-tea during his stay on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]<ref name="TFS" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="TNEC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Boba Fett: The Fight to Survive]]'' to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Grub-tea appeared in ''[[Boba Fett: The Fight to Survive]]'', a [[2002]] young readers book written by [[Terry Bisson]] as the first book of the [[Star Wars: Boba Fett (novel series)|''Boba Fett'' series]].<ref name="TFS" />

==Appearances==
